title: Weekly Share Import
subtitle: Upload the share quantities for one delivery week. Existing data for the same week is replaced when you apply a new file.
drop_hint: Drag the CSV here or click to select
has_errors: {{n}} row(s) have validation errors. Fix the file and re-upload.

explainer.title: About this page
explainer.reimport_body: You can upload a new file for the same week at any time. When you press 'Apply to database', the previous batch is automatically marked as superseded and the new quantities replace it. Nothing is overwritten before you click Apply.
explainer.csv_intro: Comma-separated CSV with a header row. One row per (station-day, variation).
explainer.tenant_csv_format_label: Your tenant CSV format is set to
explainer.csv_codes_hint: The station, day and variation codes are translated to internal IDs through
explainer.csv_codes_hint_end: . Make sure every code in the file has a mapping configured first.

mappings.title: External Code Mappings
mappings.subtitle: Map upstream system codes (used in the weekly CSV) to your internal IDs. Required before importing.
mappings.explainer_body: When the weekly CSV arrives from your upstream system, it uses its own codes (e.g. 'VAR-S' or 'STN-001'). Jasmin needs to know which internal ID each code refers to. Add one mapping row per code: pick the kind (variation, station or delivery day), enter the external code as it appears in the CSV, and paste the matching internal ID from Jasmin. Without these mappings the import will fail validation.
